title: taraxacum damnabile
intro: Taraxacum damnabile, also known as the common dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic and having anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum damnabile include treating digestive issues, reducing blood pressure, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum damnabile can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in culinary dishes and as a coffee substitute.
